refresh-completions-description: If you're linked to any account (GD, AREDL, Pointercrate), you can use this button to fetch your completions across your different platforms.
refresh-completions-warning: You can only refresh once per hour
add-completion-data-1: Once your completions have been fetched, you can append data to them.
add-completion-data-2: For youtube links, those are fetched automatically and cannot be changed. You can request a modification by contacting staff.
generate-spreadsheet: And if you want to, you can generate a spreadsheet of your completions!
update-gd-stats-description: To get your GD stats updated on the site, you need to run /profile with the UL bot in #⁠bot-commands to send your new GD Stats to Updated Leaderboards. Then wait for the notification on the site (it should appear in an hour to a day). After this, you can click on "Sync completions" to display your new GD stats in your profile.
